name_en: M13664 Black & Colorful! LV x TM Key Coin Purse. This replica of the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series is vibrant and made of coated canvas, featuring a lively Monogram pattern reinterpreted with the rainbow color tones of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The key coin purse features a silver zipper and comes with a chain and hook for securely storing keys.

12 x 7 x 1.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width).
